# TaxProNG

> Nigerian tax compliance platform for VAT, CIT, PIT, WHT, CGT, and Stamp Duty filing under Nigeria Tax Act 2025. Built for businesses and tax professionals.

TaxProNG automates tax calculations, tracks FIRS deadlines, generates compliant returns, and provides an AI-powered tax advisor trained on Nigerian tax law.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing.
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge): Tax documentation, guides, and reference material.
- [Tax Q&A](/tax-qa): Ask questions about Nigerian tax law and get cited answers.
- [Industry Modules](/industry): Sector-specific calculators for oil & gas, banking, and digital economy.
- [Professional Services](/professional-services): Expert tax consulting and setup assistance.
- [Support](/support): Help center and contact form.
- [Sign In / Sign Up](/auth): Account access.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
